## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / hook

## Checklist

- [ ] Types are correct (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] New hooks/components are exported from the package index
- [ ] JSDoc added for new public API surface
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated if applicable
